long_description:
[Network] Daemonset High Memory Usage[STAGING] is Triggered on mzone726

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/genctl-network-high-cpu-memory-usage.html
TIP Short Description: [fabcon-edge-manager, fabcon-manager] in mzone726 is using over 80% of CPU limit
TIP Situation: Observed issue in service-error-Daemonset High Memory Usage
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-network-genctl:::mzone726::

Event Generated:

Severity:         Medium
Metric:
    max(avg_over_time(sysdig_container_memory_limit_used_percent{kube_daemonset_name=~"fabcon-manager|fabcon-edge-manager",container_name!="vault-agent-init"}[10m])) by (kube_cluster_name,kube_node_name,kube_pod_name)>80 = 80.0052
Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'mzone726' and kube_node_name = 'dal2-qz1-sr2-rk027-s04' and kube_pod_name = 'fabcon-manager-xvtjh'

Time:             12/09/2025 12:57 AM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://us-south.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/910302c05d5e49f791b39ccad7167b2b/31cd1241-2f66-4bbc-ae24-1fd27bd261a5?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F179712198%2Fdetails

------

Triggered by Alert:

Type:         Prometheus
Name:         [Network] Daemonset High Memory Usage[STAGING]
Description:  [Network] microservices are using over 80% of the memory limit - GENCTL-NETWORK
Team:         Monitor Operations
Scope:
    Everywhere
Alert When:   max(avg_over_time(sysdig_container_memory_limit_used_percent{kube_daemonset_name=~"fabcon-manager|fabcon-edge-manager",container_name!="vault-agent-init"}[10m])) by (kube_cluster_name,kube_node_name,kube_pod_name)>80
Duration: 10 m
Alert URL:    https://us-south.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/910302c05d5e49f791b39ccad7167b2b/31cd1241-2f66-4bbc-ae24-1fd27bd261a5?redirectRoute=%2Falerts%2Frules%3FalertId%3D1123053
